title: Knowledge Decision Log
description: Decision log schema for the knowledge graph. Captures investment, exit, strategy, policy, and operational decisions with full audit trail. Decisions never expire and form the institutional memory of the platform.

decisionId.description: Unique decision identifier. Format: DEC-{YYYY}-{SEQ} (e.g., DEC-2026-001)

type.description: Decision classification. INVESTMENT: buy/pass on a deal. EXIT: sell/hold/refi. STRATEGY: fund-level strategy change. POLICY: policy or threshold change. OPERATIONAL: property-level operational decision.

title.description: Concise decision title. Must be specific and actionable.

decidedBy.description: Decision maker: agent name, IC committee, or human operator

reviewedBy.description: Agents or humans who reviewed the decision before finalization

rationale.description: Detailed rationale for the decision. Must include: what data was considered, what alternatives were evaluated, why this option was chosen. Minimum 50 characters.

reason_rejected.description: Why this alternative was not chosen

alternatives.description: Alternatives considered and reasons for rejection

reference.description: Event ID, entity ID, insight ID, file path, or URL

summary.description: Brief summary of what this data point contributed to the decision

dataSupport.description: Data points that supported the decision. Creates an audit trail from decision back to evidence.

items.description: Entity IDs affected by this decision

affectedEntities.description: Entities whose records should be updated as a result of this decision

items.description: Pipeline names affected by this decision (e.g., 'acquisition', 'disposition', 'hold-period')

affectedPipelines.description: Pipelines whose behavior or parameters change as a result of this decision

effectiveDate.description: Date when the decision takes effect. May differ from the decision date.

expirationDate.description: Date when the decision expires and must be reviewed. Null = no expiration (permanent).

reviewDate.description: Scheduled date for reviewing this decision. All STRATEGY and POLICY decisions must have a review date.

status.description: Current status. ACTIVE: in effect. EXPIRED: past expiration date. SUPERSEDED: replaced by a newer decision. REVERSED: explicitly undone.

supersededBy.description: Decision ID that superseded this decision, if status is SUPERSEDED

reversedBy.description: Decision ID that reversed this decision, if status is REVERSED

outcome.description: Post-decision outcome tracking. Populated over time as results materialize.

assessedAt.description: When the outcome was last assessed

result.description: Assessment of whether the decision produced the intended result

metricsImpact.description: Quantified impact of the decision on key metrics

confidenceAtDecision.description: Confidence level at the time the decision was made

tags.description: Tags for categorization and subscription matching
